sections.paragraph:
-

(1) to sling, to throw stones with a sling. Part. קֹולֵעַ a slinger, Jud. 20:16 . Trop. to cast (a people) out of a country, Jer 10:18.

(2) to grave, to sculpture, to engrave, 1Ki 6:29, 32 1Ki 6:32, 35 1Ki 6:35prop. to make slings, i.e. indentations like slings. [This signification is altogether separated in Thes.]

Piel, i.q. Kal. No. 1, 1Sa 17:49 25:29 .

Derivatives, מִקְלַעַת and-
